discipline: documentation is a scoring label only; never an inference input

flagged_cases.note: the C++ scorer decisively prefers a target the documentation does not name; the gate abstained (no unique certification), so this is a surfaced tension, not a false certification.
partial (uncertified) frame fit; passive diagonal-affine frame identification is degenerate -- needs an active on-robot probe to adjudicate.
partial (uncertified) frame fit; passive diagonal-affine frame identification is degenerate -- needs an active on-robot probe to adjudicate.

gripper_conventions_by_ecosystem.ALOHA: gripper is a joint dimension; ACT/ALOHA convention 0=closed, 1=open
gripper_conventions_by_ecosystem.OXE-open_gripper-bool: open_gripper boolean: True=open (TOTO) -- inverted naming vs closedness
gripper_conventions_by_ecosystem.SO-100/101: gripper is a joint position channel (main_gripper / gripper.pos)
